role.name: Explorer
role.description: Observant (S) and Prospecting (P) personality types, known for their spontaneity, ingenuity, and ability to live in the moment.
role.description_zh: 观察型(S)和展望型(P)人格类型，以其自发性、独创性和活在当下的能力著称。

strategy.name: Constant Improvement
strategy.description: Constant Improvers are quiet, individualistic people. They tend to be success-driven and often perfectionistic, spending a lot of time and effort on their work.
strategy.description_zh: 持续改进者是安静、个人主义的人。他们往往以成功为导向，常常追求完美，在工作上花费大量时间和精力。

introverted.name: Introverted
introverted.description: Individuals prefer solitary activities and get exhausted by social interaction. They tend to be quite sensitive to external stimulation (e.g. sound) in general.
introverted.description_zh: 内向型个体喜欢独处活动，通过社交互动感到疲惫。他们通常对外部刺激（如声音）相当敏感。

observant.name: Observant
observant.description: Individuals are highly practical, pragmatic and down-to-earth. They tend to have strong habits and focus on what is happening or has already happened.
observant.description_zh: 观察型个体非常务实、实用且脚踏实地。他们往往有很强的习惯，专注于正在发生或已经发生的事情。

thinking.name: Thinking
thinking.description: Individuals focus on objectivity and rationality, prioritizing logic over emotions. They tend to hide their feelings and see efficiency as more important than cooperation.
thinking.description_zh: 思考型个体注重客观性和理性，将逻辑置于情感之上。他们往往隐藏自己的感受，认为效率比合作更重要。

prospecting.name: Prospecting
prospecting.description: Individuals are very good at improvising and spotting opportunities. They tend to be flexible, relaxed nonconformists who prefer keeping their options open.
prospecting.description_zh: 展望型个体非常擅长即兴发挥和发现机会。他们往往是灵活、放松的不墨守成规者，喜欢保持选择的开放性。

turbulent.name: Turbulent
turbulent.description: Individuals are self-conscious and sensitive to stress. They are likely to experience a wide range of emotions and to be success-driven, perfectionistic and eager to improve.
turbulent.description_zh: 动荡型个体自我意识强且对压力敏感。他们可能会经历广泛的情绪变化，以成功为导向，追求完美并渴望改进。

strengths.name: Creative and Practical
strengths.description: Virtuosos are very imaginative when it comes to practical things, mechanics, and crafts. They love using their hands to put ideas into action.
strengths.description_zh: 鉴赏家在实用事物、机械和手工艺方面非常有想象力。他们喜欢用双手将想法付诸行动。

strengths.name: Spontaneous and Rational
strengths.description: Combining spontaneity with logic, Virtuosos can switch mindsets to fit new situations with little effort, making them flexible and versatile individuals.
strengths.description_zh: 将自发性与逻辑相结合，鉴赏家可以毫不费力地切换思维方式以适应新情况，使他们成为灵活多变的人。

strengths.name: Great in a Crisis
strengths.description: With all this hands-on creativity and spontaneity, it's no wonder that Virtuosos are naturals in crisis situations. People with this personality type usually enjoy a little physical risk, and they aren't afraid to get their hands dirty when the situation calls for it.
strengths.description_zh: 凭借所有这些动手创造力和自发性，难怪鉴赏家在危机情况下是天生的。这种人格类型的人通常喜欢一点身体风险，当情况需要时，他们不怕弄脏自己的手。

strengths.name: Relaxed
strengths.description: Through all this, Virtuosos are able to stay quite relaxed. They live in the moment and go with the flow, refusing to worry too much about the future.
strengths.description_zh: 尽管如此，鉴赏家能够保持相当放松。他们活在当下，顺其自然，拒绝为未来过度担忧。

weaknesses.name: Stubborn
weaknesses.description: As easily as Virtuosos go with the flow, they can also ignore it entirely, and move in another direction with little apology or sensitivity.
weaknesses.description_zh: 就像鉴赏家顺其自然一样，他们也可以完全忽视它，几乎没有道歉或敏感地朝另一个方向前进。

weaknesses.name: Private and Reserved
weaknesses.description: Virtuoso personalities are notoriously difficult to get to know. They keep their personal matters to themselves, and often just prefer silence to small talk.
weaknesses.description_zh: 鉴赏家人格出了名的难以了解。他们把自己的私事保密，往往更喜欢沉默而不是闲聊。

weaknesses.name: Easily Bored
weaknesses.description: Virtuosos enjoy novelty, which makes them excellent tinkerers, but much less reliable when it comes to focusing on things long-term.
weaknesses.description_zh: 鉴赏家喜欢新奇，这使他们成为优秀的修补匠，但在长期专注于事物方面却不太可靠。

weaknesses.name: Dislike Commitment
weaknesses.description: Long-term commitments are particularly onerous for Virtuosos. They prefer to take things day-by-day, and may consider the feeling of being locked into something for a long time as downright oppressive.
weaknesses.description_zh: 长期承诺对鉴赏家来说尤其繁重。他们喜欢日复一日地处理事情，可能会认为长时间被锁定在某件事中的感觉是完全压抑的。

research_insight.title: Research Insight
research_insight.content: Turbulent Virtuosos are the least likely personality type to enjoy making "to-do" lists for themselves.
research_insight.content_zh: 动荡型鉴赏家是最不可能喜欢为自己制作"待办事项"清单的人格类型。
